changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: Index backing the hot per-URL dispatch path (OrderSerializationService): the busy-check (existsByLinkAndStatusIn) and the next-pending pick (findOrdersByLinkAndStatusOrderById, WHERE link=? AND status=? ORDER BY id) — leftmost link= equality + status + id sort. The sweeper's status-led queries (findLinksWithPendingAndNoActive / findStuckActiveLinks) are not link-driven and keep using idx_orders_status / idx_orders_processing. Partial — excludes the terminal statuses (COMPLETED/PARTIAL/CANCELLED), which serialization never queries; that keeps the index to the small non-terminal working set (matches the existing idx_orders_status / idx_orders_processing partial-on-status convention). The orders table is partitioned by created_at; PostgreSQL propagates the index to every existing and future partition automatically.
